seoTitle: How to Add a New User in n8n's Team Settings
metaDescription: Learn how to invite team members to your n8n workspace, assign access roles, and manage collaborator permissions.
intro: Working with a team on n8n means inviting collaborators and deciding what level of access each person should have. This guide covers opening the user management area, sending an invite, and assigning roles so your workspace stays organized as it grows.

steps.heading: Open your workspace settings
steps.body: Go to your n8n dashboard's lower settings console to find team management options.

steps.heading: Find the users section
steps.body: Navigate to the Users and Team Settings area to see your current collaborators.

steps.heading: Click invite user
steps.body: Open the invite form to start adding a new team member.

steps.heading: Enter their email and set a role
steps.body: Provide the collaborator's email address and choose their access permission level.

steps.heading: Send the invite and confirm
steps.body: Dispatch the invitation and check the pending invites list to confirm it was sent.

faq.question: How do I invite someone to my n8n workspace?
faq.answer: You send an invite from the Users and Team Settings area by entering their email address.

faq.question: Can I control what a new user is allowed to edit?
faq.answer: Yes, you can assign a specific access role to each user when inviting them.

faq.question: Can I remove a user later?
faq.answer: Yes, you can manage or remove existing users from the same team settings area.

faq.question: Is there a limit to how many users I can add?
faq.answer: Seat limits depend on your n8n plan, so check your workspace settings for current allocations.
